character.name: boss_ch1_stag
character.prompt: Corrupted stag apostle boss, dark fantasy. Massive deer creature with dark brown-black decaying body, exposed white ribs on the side, glowing red cracks and fissures across the body, one glowing orange eye, empty dark left eye socket, bony skull-like deer head with sharp jaw, giant branching antlers like dead trees, long thin whip-like tail. Berserk apostle inspired dark souls beast boss.
